name: Iwabuchi Corporation
summary: Iwabuchi Corporation manufactures and sells electrical overhead wire hardware for electric power, communication, signals, broadcasting, and railway industries in Japan. It offers power transmission and distribution equipment parts; communication equipment; broadcast receiving and supporting equipment; synthetic resin electrical insulation materials; and other electrical connection equipment. The company also provides distribution line pillar, communication/telephone track pillar, broadband pillar, and traffic lights/road signs pillar; and disaster prevention radio facility pillar and sports facilities pillar. In addition, it offers sticking paper prevention sheets; spring filter, a commodity that is developed for the reuse of industrial water and industrial lubricating oils; MAG +1, a high corrosion-resistant plating for salt damage area; and sheet precision sheet metal workpieces. The company was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Matsudo, Japan.
